description.unified: Deals M.DMG 7 times to nearby enemies within a circular area. Then deals M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for [3->1.5]sec.

Deals M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for [2->0.5]sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for [15->10]sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by [300->15%]. While active, releases a shockwave every [2->1.3]sec, dealing M.DMG to nearby enemies.

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal M.DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by [200->10%]. When Kirze attacks enemies affected by [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. After 5 sec, [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes, dealing M.DMG, plus an additional amount of M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], and resets all [Arcane Crystal Energy] stacks.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to [(added) 150], increases Crit Chance by [200->150], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [30%->20%].

II.unified: Increases Crit Chance by [10% ATK boost->50].

III.unified: Increases Crit Chance by [15% ATK boost->75].

IV.unified: Increases Crit Chance by [25% ATK boost->125].

dark.unified: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times. [100% DMG if 1 enemy->(removed)]

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] Increases duration by 4 sec. [Mana cost reduced by 1->(removed)]

dark.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] While active, increases Kirze’s ATK Spd by 40%. [DMG to Non-hero enemies by 20%->(removed)]

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Curse] While active, additionally reduces ATK Spd by [300->10%].
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [25%->65%] for [20->10] sec.

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [250->100].
[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked. [Cooldown decreased by 30%->(removed)]
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by 250 and additionally increases CC duration increase effect by {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [40%->30%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.unified: Greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!].Normal and Skill attacks have a [4%->8%] chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is increased by 2 times against Bosses.
